config.dialoguechance.tooltip: Chance (0.1 to 1.0) that each interested NPC will comment on your activities.
dialogue.alex.cooking: Hey! I heard you were cooking yesterday. Did you make anything with eggs? I love a good Complete Breakfast.
dialogue.alex.farming: Working hard on the farm, huh? That's how you build real muscles!
dialogue.elliott.fishing: I noticed you were fishing yesterday... {item} — what a magnificent catch! The ocean provides endlessly.
dialogue.elliott.cooking: The aroma of home-cooked meals... you made {item}? How delightful!
dialogue.harvey.cooking: I see you've been cooking! A balanced diet is the foundation of good health. What did you make?
dialogue.harvey.artisangoods: You've been busy producing artisan goods! {item} is quite a fine product.
dialogue.harvey.farming: Fresh produce from your own farm — nothing is healthier than that. Keep it up!
dialogue.harvey.beverages: I heard you were working with beverages yesterday. Coffee, I hope? It's my favorite.
dialogue.sam.mining: Dude, you went mining yesterday? Did you find anything cool down there?
dialogue.sam.cooking: You made some food? Sweet! Did you make any pizza? I could eat pizza every day.
dialogue.sebastian.mining: You were in the mines yesterday, huh? I like the dark, quiet places down there... when there aren't monsters.
dialogue.sebastian.voiditems: Wait... you found {item}? That's... actually really cool. Where did you get it?
dialogue.sebastian.combat: Heard you took down some monsters yesterday. {count} of them? Not bad.
dialogue.shane.beverages: You were making drinks yesterday? ...Got any beer?
dialogue.shane.cooking: You cooked something? Was it Pepper Poppers? Those are the best.
dialogue.shane.animalcare: You're taking care of your animals, right? ...Good. They deserve it.
dialogue.abigail.mining: You went to the mines yesterday! Find any amethysts? I love those.
dialogue.abigail.combat: You fought {count} monsters yesterday? That's awesome! I wish I could've been there.
dialogue.abigail.sweets: Mmm, {item}? I have such a sweet tooth... save some for me next time!
dialogue.abigail.farming: I saw you harvested some pumpkins! ...Wait, you didn't? Well, you should.
dialogue.emily.mining: You found gems yesterday? Oh, I can feel their energy from here! {item} has such beautiful vibrations.
dialogue.emily.animalcare: You spent time with your animals? I can sense the positive energy flowing between you and them.
dialogue.haley.flowers: Oh! You picked {item}? Sunflowers are my absolute favorite, but all flowers are beautiful.
dialogue.haley.sweets: Did you bake something sweet yesterday? {item}? ...Maybe you could bring me some?
dialogue.haley.cooking: You were cooking? I hope it was something cute like a Fruit Salad!
dialogue.leah.foraging: I heard you were foraging in the forest! There's something magical about finding wild ingredients.
dialogue.leah.cooking: You cooked {item}? I love meals made with fresh, natural ingredients.
dialogue.leah.artisangoods: Making artisan goods, huh? There's an art to it, really. {item} sounds wonderful.
dialogue.maru.technology: You collected {item}? Oh! I could use something like that for my latest experiment!
dialogue.maru.mining: You were mining! Did you find any rare minerals? I'm always looking for interesting specimens.
dialogue.maru.farming: Your crops are doing well! I've been studying soil composition — it's fascinating stuff.
dialogue.maru.cooking: I see you cooked yesterday! I burn things sometimes... science and cooking don't always mix.
dialogue.penny.cooking: You cooked {item} yesterday? That sounds lovely. I've been trying to learn more recipes myself.
dialogue.penny.farming: Your farm must be beautiful with all those crops. The children and I walked by the other day.
dialogue.penny.flowers: You picked {item}? How lovely! Flowers always brighten up a room.
dialogue.caroline.cooking: I heard you were cooking yesterday! You should try making it with Green Tea — it adds a nice flavor.
dialogue.caroline.beverages: You made some beverages? I've been really into tea lately. Have you tried my tea garden?
dialogue.caroline.flowers: Oh, you picked {item}? I love keeping flowers in the house. They make everything feel alive.
dialogue.clint.mining: You were in the mines, huh? I hope you found some quality ore. Bring it by the shop if you need anything processed.
dialogue.demetrius.technology: Interesting! You collected {item}? I'd love to study the properties of that material.
dialogue.demetrius.farming: I noticed your farm has been productive! Have you considered rotating your crops for better soil health?
dialogue.dwarf.mining: Mining. Good. Gems underground. You find good ones? {item}?
dialogue.evelyn.flowers: {item}? Oh dear, that's one of my favorites! Flowers remind me of when George and I were young.
dialogue.evelyn.sweets: Did you bake something sweet? I made some cookies myself yesterday. We should trade recipes!
dialogue.evelyn.farming: Your garden is coming along nicely, dear. Fresh vegetables are so important for a healthy life.
dialogue.george.cooking: Hmph. You were cooking yesterday? I hope it was something simple. Fancy food is overrated.
dialogue.george.farming: I saw your crops from the window. ...Not bad. I used to farm too, you know.
dialogue.gus.cooking: You cooked {item}? Not bad! But you should come try mine at the Saloon — I've perfected the recipe.
dialogue.gus.fishing: Fresh fish! {item}? Bring some to the Saloon and I'll cook something special for you.
dialogue.jas.sweets: Did you make {item}? Can I try some? Please please please?
dialogue.jas.flowers: Pretty flowers! {item} is so pretty! Can I have one for my room?
dialogue.jodi.cooking: You were cooking yesterday! {item}? I'm always looking for new dinner ideas for the family.
dialogue.jodi.fishing: You caught fish? {item}? Kent loves fish... I should ask for your recipe.
dialogue.jodi.farming: Fresh vegetables from your farm? That's wonderful! I wish I had more time to garden.
dialogue.kent.foraging: Foraging, huh? Reminds me of survival training. There's good stuff out in those woods.
dialogue.kent.cooking: You cooked {item}? Smells like it was good. After my time away, I appreciate a home-cooked meal more than ever.
dialogue.kent.combat: You were fighting monsters? Be careful out there. I know what it's like to face dangerous situations.
dialogue.krobus.voiditems: You found {item}? ...Good. The void is not something to fear. It is part of balance.
dialogue.krobus.combat: You fought monsters... Were they shadow creatures? I hope you were gentle... some of them are my friends.
dialogue.krobus.mining: The deep places underground... they are familiar to me. Did you find anything strange down there?
dialogue.krobus.magic: I sense you touched something magical yesterday. {item}... yes, that has power.
dialogue.leo.animalcare: You... take care of animals? Like parrots? I like parrots. They are my friends on the island.
dialogue.leo.foraging: You find food in the wild? Me too! Island has many good things to eat if you know where to look.
dialogue.lewis.cooking: I heard you were cooking up a storm yesterday! The town could use more good cooks.
dialogue.lewis.farming: Your farm is a credit to this community! {count} crops harvested? Impressive!
dialogue.lewis.beverages: You've been making beverages? Perhaps you could supply the next town festival!
dialogue.linus.foraging: You were foraging yesterday! Nature provides everything we need, doesn't it? I found some good berries myself.
dialogue.linus.fishing: Fishing... there's nothing more peaceful. Did you catch {item}? That's a fine one.
dialogue.linus.cooking: You cooked with wild ingredients? That's the best way to eat. Simple and honest.
dialogue.marnie.animalcare: You're taking such good care of your animals! I can tell they're happy. Keep it up!
dialogue.marnie.cooking: You made {item}? Oh, that sounds delicious! I love a good home-cooked meal.
dialogue.marnie.farming: Your farm is looking wonderful! There's nothing like working the land with your own hands.
dialogue.pam.beverages: You made {item}? ...That's my kind of farmer. Ha!
dialogue.pam.cooking: You were cooking? Make anything filling? A good meal hits the spot after a long day of driving.
dialogue.pierre.farming: I heard your harvest was impressive yesterday — {count} crops! You should sell them here. My prices are fair... better than that Joja place.
dialogue.robin.artisangoods: You produced {item}? Nice work! Crafting things with your own hands is the best feeling.
dialogue.robin.cooking: You cooked {item}? You'll have to share the recipe! Demetrius always appreciates a good meal.
dialogue.robin.farming: Your farm is growing nicely! If you need any buildings, you know where to find me.
dialogue.sandy.flowers: You picked {item}? Oh, I miss flowers so much out here in the desert. They're so rare here!
dialogue.sandy.cooking: You made something tropical? {item}? I love anything with exotic flavors!
dialogue.vincent.sweets: {item}?! Can I have some? Mom says I eat too much candy but I don't think that's true!
dialogue.vincent.animalcare: You have animals on your farm? Can I come see them? I want to pet the chickens!
dialogue.willy.fishing: Ye caught {item} yesterday? Fine work! That's a {count}-catch day — not bad at all, matey.
dialogue.willy.mining: Been down in the mines, have ye? I've found some good gold bars that way. Useful for tackle and gear.
dialogue.wizard.magic: {item}... yes, I sensed a disturbance in the magical field yesterday. You've been handling arcane materials.
dialogue.wizard.voiditems: Void essence... be cautious with those. The void is a source of great power, but also great danger.
dialogue.generic.fishing: I heard you went fishing yesterday! Caught {count} fish, right?
dialogue.generic.mining: You were in the mines yesterday? That takes courage!
dialogue.generic.farming: Your farm seems to be doing well! {count} crops harvested?
dialogue.generic.cooking: Something smells good... did you cook yesterday?
dialogue.generic.combat: I heard there was some commotion in the mines. Was that you fighting monsters?
dialogue.generic.foraging: You were out foraging yesterday? I love what nature has to offer.
dialogue.generic.animalcare: Your animals look happy! You must be taking good care of them.
dialogue.generic.artisangoods: You've been making artisan goods? That's quite a skill!
dialogue.generic.flowers: I noticed some fresh flowers around. Did you pick those?
dialogue.generic.beverages: Were you making beverages yesterday? I could use a drink!
dialogue.generic.sweets: Something sweet was made yesterday... I could smell it from here!
dialogue.generic.technology: I heard you were working with some interesting materials yesterday.
dialogue.generic.voiditems: I heard you found some... unusual items. Be careful with those.
dialogue.generic.magic: There was a strange energy in the air yesterday. Did you notice?
